title: helichrysum nitens subsp. nitens
intro: Helichrysum nitens subsp. nitens, also known as the yellow everlasting, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene compounds such as borneol and bornyl acetate. The plant has been traditionally used to promote wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Helichrysum nitens subsp. nitens can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often employed in folk medicine to support overall health and well-being.
